technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in technical duplicate.
experimental_design: we performed an imaging-based single-cell small interfering RNA (siRNA) screen in HCC1569 cells
factor_value: FBXL12, CYCLIN E, and Fanconi anaemia signalling are positively correlated
